local-repo.description: Persist EOF hook mode only for the current repository clone/worktree under .git/.

global.description: Persist EOF hook mode globally for this machine under %USERPROFILE%/.codex so repositories using the shared hook runner inherit it unless a local override exists.

manual.description: Do not auto-fix staged files in pre-commit. Users run trim manually when needed.

autofix.description: Trim staged text files in pre-commit and re-stage them before validation.
